title: AI MYTHBUSTERS
subtitle: Identify whether the statement is Real or Myth

questions.statement: AI will replace all engineers in the next 5 years.
questions.funFact: Myth! AI is a tool that augments engineers. It helps automate tasks, but human creativity, problem-solving, and decision-making remain irreplaceable.

questions.statement: Generative AI models can produce inaccurate or fabricated information.
questions.funFact: Real! This is known as 'hallucination' — always review and verify AI-generated content before using it for official work.

questions.statement: AI models learn by memorizing every input verbatim, like a filing cabinet.
questions.funFact: Myth! Models learn statistical patterns across huge datasets rather than storing exact copies of what they were trained on.

title: EMOJI PUZZLE
subtitle: Decode the emojis and type the correct answer

questions.hint: It's a technology that enables machines to think and learn like humans.
Keeping data and accounts safe from bad actors.
Storing and processing data somewhere other than your own laptop.

title: MATCH THE TECH
subtitle: Match the AI innovation with the correct description

pairs.description: Automates repetitive business tasks using software bots
A virtual replica of a physical asset or process
Understands and responds to voice commands
Learns from data and makes predictions without being explicitly programmed
